## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Goodcall to discuss SEO content strategy progress and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant progress on content creation: 69 articles published, 34 more coming next week](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Early performance metrics show promising results, especially for appointment scheduling content](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Focus shifting to conversion optimization through pop-ups and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Enterprise software cluster identified as next priority after current topics](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation and Publishing Progress

  - [69 articles published on answering services](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [34 more articles to be published early next week](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [New CMS structure implemented for answering services, appointment scheduling, and salon topics](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [On track with publishing timeline, no delays](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Performance Metrics and Insights

  - [Week 2 of publishing: 32 clicks, 20k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Appointment scheduling articles (5) outperforming answering service articles (69)](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Plan to focus next 25 articles on appointment scheduling due to better performance](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Conversion Optimization Strategies

  - [Implementing pop-ups for lead generation (4x increase in leads for another client)](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Two types of pop-ups suggested: initial visit and exit intent](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Need to set up proper UTM tracking for accurate conversion attribution](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Exploring lead magnet creation based on best-performing content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Enterprise Software Content

  - [Identified as next priority after current topics (answering services, appointment scheduling, salon)](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Bob emphasized the importance of creating articles around enterprise software and vendors like Five9](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)

  - [Potential for future API integration to automate content posting](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Some formatting issues encountered during manual publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/e6nGUVMskwxTS85eqwJ5gxfMkFDxCp1U?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
